creator: kaihugoh@stud.ntnu.no
text:
Motherboard: Asus K8N-VM
Just a little update to my entry about the Asus K8N-VM.

Everything works excellently except for ACPI. Intel HDA support requires snd_hda from http://people.freebsd.org/~ariff/.

Fix:
